seo.title: PublicSelf — play with your own image
seo.description: Upload a couple of photos, dress up, drop in props, and play around with new versions of yourself. A playful studio for portraits with your own face.

hero.badge: Try yourself in new photo ideas
hero.title: Create surprising, useful, and fun images of yourself.
hero.description: Bring a couple of photos. Pick an outfit, a pose, a setting — or upload a piece of clothing and try it on. Play around. Keep what you like.
hero.imageAlt: A composed portrait on a dark background — calm presence, tailored look
slogans: Pick an idea. See yourself in it. Change what you want.
Same you, new outfit, new pose — without the shoot.
Tweak the version you like instead of starting over.

featureCards.title: Build a look
featureCards.body: Start from your photos and shape an outfit that still feels like you.

featureCards.title: Try it on
featureCards.body: Pick a pose, a setting, drop in a clothing item — see how it lands.

featureCards.title: Tweak and save
featureCards.body: Refine the ones that are close, keep the ones you like.

intro.title: A private studio for playing with your own image.
intro.body: Bring a couple of photos. Try on outfits, settings, poses, and energies you'd never set up for a real shoot. Some shots will land, some won't — that's the fun. Keep what you like.

slides.caption: Bring in a couple of photos — they keep your face and body consistent.
Pick an outfit, a pose, a setting. Drop in your own clothing item if you have one.
Tweak what's close, save the ones you like.

gallery.title: Versions of you
gallery.description: Some directions to play with — outfits, moods, settings. Save what feels right.

items.title: Cleaner version of you
items.body: Sharper and calmer, still recognizably you.

items.title: Try on a different look
items.body: See how an outfit changes the whole mood.

items.title: Same you, different energy
items.body: Shift from relaxed to sharp, soft to bold.

items.title: Step into a scene
items.body: Change the setting without losing yourself.

items.title: Drop in your own item
items.body: Upload a jacket or accessory and try it on.

items.title: Save what you like
items.body: Download anything that feels worth keeping.

pricing.title: Want more rounds?
pricing.description: {credits} free credits to start. Pick a pack here, then sign in to the studio to check out.

plans.label: Starter
plans.name: PublicSelf Starter
plans.body: Enough to play with a few outfits and poses and keep a first batch you like.

plans.label: Studio
plans.name: PublicSelf Studio
plans.body: More room to keep playing — extra poses, more tweaks, more keepers.

sections.title: Bring your photos
sections.subtitle: Face and body reference
sections.body: Upload a couple of photos so the studio keeps your likeness consistent across generations.

sections.title: Pick a look
sections.subtitle: Outfit, pose, setting
sections.body: Choose an outfit, a pose, a backdrop. Drop in your own clothing item if you want to try it on.

sections.title: Tweak and save
sections.subtitle: Refine instead of restart
sections.body: When something is close, tweak the details. Download what you want to keep.

footer.title: Try yourself in a new idea.
footer.body: {credits} free credits to start. Bring a couple of photos and see what you make.
footer.legalPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
